description: We are the team behind multiple mobile apps and gaming products, driving user acquisition growth, multimodal AI model development, and scalable data infrastructure. You will work closely with algorithm engineers, data scientists, and product teams. This role integrates three key tracks: User Acquisition Analytics , Multimodal LLM Data Engineering , and General Data Engineering . Fresh graduates with strong potential are highly welcome. Key Responsibilities (based on your background and interests, you will focus on one of the following tracks) Track 1: User Acquisition (UA) Data Analytics Analyze ad campaign performance (ROI, conversion rate, LTV) and build/maintain dashboards and visualization reports Collaborate with algorithm engineers on modeling data preparation: data cleaning, feature engineering, sample construction, and sampling Support pre-campaign strategy, post-launch data tracking, attribution analysis, and KPI monitoring Contribute to standardized data processing workflows, data dictionaries, and metric systems Track 2: Multimodal LLM Data Engineering Perform high-quality annotation, classification, and structuring of complex multimodal data (text, image, video, audio) Evaluate LLM/MLLM responses for accuracy, coherence, and safety through rating, ranking, and detailed feedback Enforce quality assurance protocols, audit annotation results, and refine data annotation guidelines Collaborate with engineering and data science teams to provide timely data insights for model improvement Track 3: General Data Engineering Design, build, and maintain scalable data architectures and ETL pipelines Process and transform large-scale datasets, ensuring data quality, integrity, and security Optimize data warehouse and data lake solutions to support analytics and product optimization Work with product and engineering teams to enable data-driven decision-making Requirements Basic Qualifications Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, AI, or a related technical field Fresh graduates are welcome; internship or project experience is a plus Technical Skills (must have) Proficient in SQL and Python (complex queries, data integration, performance tuning) Technical Skills (good to have – at least one area) For UA Analytics: Python/R/Excel, data visualization tools (Tableau, PowerBI, DataStudio), understanding of A/B testing, feature engineering, and labeling For Multimodal LLM: basic knowledge of deep learning or LLMs, SQL/Python scripting, data annotation or AI preprocessing experience For General Data Engineering: programming in Python/Java/Shell, ETL optimization, data warehousing/lake concepts
